code:
%%{IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic}}}%% stateDiagram-v2 [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> Pending: Create Comment Pending --> Approved: Approve Pending --> Rejected: Reject Pending --> Deleted: Delete Approved --> Deleted: Delete Rejected --> Deleted: Delete Deleted --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] state Pending {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> AwaitingModeration AwaitingModeration --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] } state Approved {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> Visible Visible --> Edited: Update Edited --> Visible } state Rejected {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> Hidden Hidden --> WithReason: Add Rejection Reason WithReason --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] } note right of Pending: Comments start in Pending state
and await moderation note right of Approved: Approved comments are visible
and can be edited note right of Rejected: Rejected comments are hidden
with optional rejection reason note right of Deleted: Deleted comments are
permanently removed

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网场景设计一个评论状态流转图。核心是从ActuatorController创建评论开始，经过Pending状态等待审核，最终可能走向Approved、Rejected或Deleted三种终态。
明白，Pending作为入口状态。我想确认一下——Pending内部是否需要展开子状态？比如实际 moderation 流程中，评论创建后是否要先进入AwaitingModeration？
对，Pending是个复合状态，内部包含AwaitingModeration。当评论创建后，会先关联到EdgeNode进行预处理，然后再等待人工审核。所以Pending内部要有ActuatorController到AwaitingModeration，再到EdgeNode的路径。
好的，Pending复合状态已构建。现在处理Approved分支——审核通过后评论变为可见，并且支持编辑。我打算让Approved内部包含Visible和Edited两个子状态，通过Update动作来回切换。
Approved的结构可以。Rejected分支需要特别注意：被拒绝的评论要Hidden，而且必须能添加拒绝原因。另外，Rejected最终要能流向MQTT Broker进行日志记录。
Rejected复合状态已完成：TelemetryStream关联到Hidden，然后通过Add Rejection Reason进入WithReason，最终流向MQTT Broker。现在补充Deleted状态——所有路径（Pending、Approved、Rejected）都能直接Delete，并且Deleted要闭环回到PLC Logic。
检查一遍：Pending到Approved是Approve动作，Pending到Rejected是Reject，Delete动作从三个状态都能触发。最后给每个主状态加个注释说明吧，特别是Deleted要强调是永久移除。
全部确认：四个注释已添加——Pending标注'await moderation'，Approved标注'visible and can be edited'，Rejected标注'hidden with optional rejection reason'，Deleted标注'permanently removed'。状态流转图已完成。
